Append xinjiang "Land use classification by city yearly0408" "Skip and warn if schema does not match" # # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY
Append xinjiang "Land use classification by city yearly0408" "Skip and warn if schema does not match" # # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY

Append G:\CLCD逐年统计\xinjiang_dissolved.shp "G:\CLCD逐年统计\Land use classification by city yearly0408\Land use classification by city yearly0408\Land use classification by city yearly0408.shp" "Use the field map to reconcile field differences" "Land_use_c "Land_use_c" true false false 80 Text 0 0,First,#;Land_use_1 "Land_use_1" true false false 19 Double 0 0,First,#;Land_use_2 "Land_use_2" true false false 80 Text 0 0,First,#;Land_use_3 "Land_use_3" true false false 80 Text 0 0,First,#;Land_use_4 "Land_use_4" true false false 19 Double 0 0,First,#;Land_use_5 "Land_use_5" true false false 80 Text 0 0,First,#" # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY

ExportFeatures "Land use classification by city yearly0408" E:\ArcGISPro\CLCD.gdb\Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0408_ExportFeatures # NOT_USE_ALIAS "省 "province" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_c,0,79;省代码 "pro_code" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_1,-1,-1;省类型 "pro_type" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_2,0,79;市 "city" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_3,0,79;市代码 "city_code" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_4,-1,-1;市类型 "city_type" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Land use classification by city yearly0408,Land_use_5,0,79" #

ExportFeatures Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601 "D:\文件\科研\CLCD逐年统计\0601\land use classification by city0601.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "省 "province" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,省,0,79;省代码 "pro_code" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,省代码,-1,-1;省类型 "pro_type" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,省类型,0,79;市 "city" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,市,0,79;市代码 "city_code" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,市代码,-1,-1;市类型 "city_type" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Landuseclassificationbycityyearly0601,市类型,0,79" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.3.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=G:\CLCD逐年统计\行政区划0601</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>land use classification by city0601.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>省</field_name><field_name>省类型</field_name><field_name>市类型</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329 G:\CLCD逐年统计\行政区划0601\China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "省代码 "省代码" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,省代码,-1,-1;市 "市" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,市,0,79;市代码 "市代码" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,市代码,-1,-1" #

ExportFeatures China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329 "D:\文件\research\China GE\行政区划单位\China_Prefecture_Level_Cities.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "省代码 "省代码" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,省代码,-1,-1;市 "市" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,市,0,79;市代码 "市代码" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities_329,市代码,-1,-1" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.3.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\文件\research\China GE\行政区划单位\Administrative_Divisions_shp</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>China_Prefecture_Level_Cities.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>面积</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

CalculateGeometryAttributes China_Prefecture_Level_Cities "面积 AREA_GEODESIC" # 平方千米 GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] 与输入相同

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.3.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\文件\research\China GE\行政区划单位\Administrative_Divisions_shp</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>China_Prefecture_Level_Cities.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>地区</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures China_Prefecture_Level_Cities "D:\文件\【duke2026spring】\R\final project\China city level shp.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "province "province" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities,省代码,-1,-1;市 "市" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities,市,0,79;city "city" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities,市代码,-1,-1;地区 "地区" true true false 10 Long 0 0,First,#,China_Prefecture_Level_Cities,地区,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
